scripts.tauri:dev: node scripts/update-tauri-config.js && sh -c 'unset CI; [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && export CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.15; exec tauri dev "$@"' sh
scripts.tauri:build: node scripts/update-tauri-config.js && sh -c 'unset CI; [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && export CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.15; exec tauri build "$@"' sh
scripts.tauri:build:debug: node scripts/update-tauri-config.js && sh -c 'unset CI; [ "$(uname -s)" = Darwin ] && export CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.15; exec tauri build --debug "$@"' sh
scripts.tauri:build:mac:all: node scripts/update-tauri-config.js && sh -c 'unset CI; export CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.15; echo "🔨 Building for ARM64 (aarch64)..."; tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin && echo "" && echo "🔨 Building for Intel (x86_64)..." && tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin && echo "" && echo "✅ Dual-arch build complete" && echo "   ARM64: src-tauri/target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/" && echo "   Intel: src-tauri/target/x86_64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/"' sh
scripts.tauri:build:mac:all:debug: node scripts/update-tauri-config.js && sh -c 'unset CI; export CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=10.15; echo "🔨 Building DEBUG for ARM64 (aarch64)..."; tauri build --debug --target aarch64-apple-darwin && echo "" && echo "🔨 Building DEBUG for Intel (x86_64)..." && tauri build --debug --target x86_64-apple-darwin && echo "" && echo "✅ Dual-arch DEBUG build complete" && echo "   ARM64: src-tauri/target/aarch64-apple-darwin/debug/bundle/" && echo "   Intel: src-tauri/target/x86_64-apple-darwin/debug/bundle/"' sh
